ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the program */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the program application */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Academic level for which the program is available (e.g., Undergrad, Graduate, Doctorate) */,
  "when_to_apply" TEXT /* When the student should apply for the program */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "award" TEXT /* Award or benefits provided by the program */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (scholarship or internship) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "parent_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent program (if applicable) */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor or organization offering the program */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the program */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_parent_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Current academic level (e.g., Undergrad, Graduate, Doctorate) */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status (e.g., U.S. citizen, permanent resident) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the student to log in to the platform */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the student (hashed) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Field of study or major of the student */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university attended by the student */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the student profile */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the student profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor or organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sponsor or organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor or organization */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the sponsor */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the sponsor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sponsor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sponsor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the university */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the university */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the student started the application */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the application submission (e.g., pending, submitted, under review) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who reviewed the application */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the application */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the review */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being reviewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review comments from the student */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the review */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the notification */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., application status update, program deadline reminder) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the notification */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the administrative user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrative user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrative user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrative user (e.g., super admin, program manager) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the administrative user */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the administrative user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrative user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the administrative user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_user_id")
)
